productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Compelling Dexterity Fudge Brown Shoe
description: Show off your style skills with the skechers Compelling-Dexterity shoe. Designed as a slip-on dressy casual loafer, it speaks volumes of your high sense of style.Upper Smooth all-leather upper Dressy casual design for weekday or weekend wear Stitched seam mock style toe Side stitching and seam detail Overlay side detailing Ventilating side panel with textile lining Embossed brand name and Airators logo detailing Padded collar and soft fabric shoe lining for snug Fit Midsole Cushioned insole Airators design insole and midsole for ventilation with every step Heel air pump for ample air circulation offering fresh comfort Shock absorbing lightweight midsole Outsole Flexible traction outsole Flex grooves further adding to traction skechers symbol grooved into the outsole adding to the traction structure Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
